title: Tama and the Alliance Shift the Battle
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Chopper as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: gyaha hahaha!! How could he say that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I gave you all a chance!! That Antibody might be able to save a few of you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kill all the ice demons! Friend or foe!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna survive and leave this stinkin' crew!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They may be the enemy, but the way their superiors treat them is pitiable!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You Samurai are just as bad!! What do you think you're protecting here?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That Tanuri's also a pirate, right?! Do you guys really think...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...He's quickly mass-producing the antibody?! Muhahaha!! Don't make me laugh! It's impossible!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet he's already taken the antibody himself and bolted!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's not a bastard like you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I Doubt That!! Treachery is a pirate's job!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Boss HYogoro!! I'll be joining you in death soon!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hehehe... no need to be in such a hurry.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That can wait until your time comes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your body is starting to warm up!! It's a little painful...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: But you're going to be fine!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You did it!! Tanuki-san, I knew you would come through!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Chopper- Sensei, the preparations are com- plate!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: WHAT THE HELL ARE YOU UP TO, TANK!?!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 40 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
